name: OpenClaw Deep Observability Plugin
description: Connected traces, cost tracking, and metrics for OpenClaw via OpenTelemetry

protocol.label: OTLP Protocol
protocol.help: Use 'http' for OTLP/HTTP (port 4318) or 'grpc' for OTLP/gRPC (port 4317)

headers.label: OTLP Headers
headers.help: Custom headers for OTLP export (e.g., Authorization for Dynatrace)

captureContent.label: Capture Agent/Tool Payload Content
captureContent.help: When enabled, records request, agent, tool, and response payload content in spans. Disable for privacy.

spanCache.label: Enable Span Cache
spanCache.help: Retains a rolling in-process window of span attributes for trace/session lookups and derived metrics.

spanCacheVerboseLogs.label: Enable Span Cache Verbose Logs
spanCacheVerboseLogs.help: Promotes span-cache insert, lookup, flush, and maintenance logs to the normal OpenClaw info log stream.

experimentalMetrics.label: Enable Experimental Metrics
experimentalMetrics.help: Enables experimental OpenClaw metrics that are not yet fully vetted for production use. These may be noisy or have performance implications.

embeddingsProcessing.label: Use Embeddings for Session Similarity
embeddingsProcessing.help: When enabled, uses text embeddings and cosine similarity instead of Jaccard similarity for agent call sessionization. This may increase CPU usage but can improve text-based metrics accuracy for semantically similar but lexically different prompts. Note: it requires the installation of @xenova/transformers.

endpoint.description: OTLP endpoint URL (e.g., http://localhost:4318 for HTTP, http://localhost:4317 for gRPC)

captureContent.description: Capture request, agent, tool, and response payload content in spans

spanCache.description: Enable the in-process span attribute cache for trace and session lookups

spanCacheVerboseLogs.description: Promote span-cache insert, lookup, flush, and maintenance logs to info level

customAttributes.description: Additional attributes applied only to the openclaw.request root span

experimentalMetrics.description: Enable experimental OpenClaw metrics that are not yet fully vetted for production use. These may be noisy or have performance implications.

embeddingsProcessing.description: When enabled, uses text embeddings and cosine similarity instead of Jaccard similarity for agent call sessionization. This may increase CPU usage but can improve text-based metrics accuracy for semantically similar but lexically different prompts. Note: it requires the installation of @xenova/transformers.
